name: June Tyson
abstract: June Tyson (February 5, 1936 – November 24, 1992) was an American singer, violinist, and dancer who performed with bandleader Sun Ra.

concerts.label: Sun Ra and His Space Arkestra
Sun Ra and His Space Arkestra
Newport Jazz Festival: Sun Ra and His Space Arkestra

about_quotes.speaker: Marshall Allen
about_quotes.evidence: she was the only woman in the band with all these men... everybody had mutual respect for her.
about_quotes.doc_title: Marshall Allen interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, July 19, 2021

about_quotes.speaker: Jerry Gordon
about_quotes.evidence: No, only to say hello. To me she was like a Goddess... no I didn't approach her.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jerry Gordon interviewed by Monk Rowe and Christian Goodwillie, via Zoom, June 30, 2021
